Uses of Interface
org.key_project.prover.rules.Rule

Packages that use Rule
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.macros
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof
This package contains the core data structures of proofs, nodes, goals, as well as machinery to deal with these data structures.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt
This package contains classes for proof environments and proof management.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule
This package contains classes for implementing rules.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.label
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt
This package contains the SMT backend of KeY, allowing to translate KeY formulas to formulas in formats such as SMT-LIB, and allowing to send such formulas to SMT solvers such as Simplify or Z3.
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy
This package contains classes implementing the proof search strategies of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.rule
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.wd
 
org.key_project.isabelletranslation.automation
 
org.key_project.prover.indexing
 
org.key_project.prover.proof.rulefilter
 
org.key_project.prover.rules
 
org.key_project.slicing

    Class
    Description
    class 
    InfFlowBlockContractInternalRule
    Rule for the application of BlockContracts.
    class 
    InfFlowContractAppTaclet
    A normal RewriteTaclet except that the formula which is added by this taclet is also added to the list of formulas contained in the INF_FLOW_CONTRACT_APPL_PROPERTY.
    class 
    InfFlowLoopContractInternalRule
     
    class 
    InfFlowWhileInvariantRule

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Map<Name,ChildTermLabelPolicy>
    TermLabelManager.computeActiveChildPolicies(TermServices services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm, Map<Name,Map<Name,ChildTermLabelPolicy>> ruleSpecificPolicies, Map<Name,ChildTermLabelPolicy> ruleIndependentPolicies)
    Computes active ChildTermLabelPolicy instances which have to be executed during the given rule application.
    protected TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer
    TermLabelManager.computeRefactorings(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm)
    Computes the TermLabelRefactoring to consider.
    static ImmutableArray<TermLabel>
    TermLabelManager.instantiateLabels(TermLabelState state, Services services, JTerm applicationTerm, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm)
    Computes the TermLabel to add to a new JTerm while a Rule is currently active.
    ImmutableArray<TermLabel>
    TermLabelManager.instantiateLabels(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm)
    Computes the TermLabel to add to a new JTerm while a Rule is currently active.
    static ImmutableArray<TermLabel>
    TermLabelManager.instantiateLabels(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm)
    Computes the TermLabel to add to a new JTerm while a Rule is currently active.
    static JTerm
    TermLabelManager.label(Services services, TermLabelState state, JTerm applicationTerm, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm)
    Computes the TermLabels for the new JTerm via TermLabelManager.instantiateLabels(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, Rule, RuleApp, Goal, Object, JTerm, JTerm) and refactors the labels below the new JTerm in addition via TermLabelManager.refactorTerm(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, Goal, Object, Rule, JTerm).
    static JTerm
    TermLabelManager.label(Services services, TermLabelState state, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm)
    Computes the TermLabels for the new JTerm via TermLabelManager.instantiateLabels(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, Rule, RuleApp, Goal, Object, JTerm, JTerm) and refactors the labels below the new JTerm in addition via TermLabelManager.refactorTerm(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, Goal, Object, Rule, JTerm).
    JTerm
    TermLabelManager.label(TermLabelState state, Services services, JTerm applicationTerm, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm)
    Computes the TermLabels for the new JTerm via TermLabelManager.instantiateLabels(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, Rule, RuleApp, Goal, Object, JTerm, JTerm) and refactors the labels below the new JTerm in addition via TermLabelManager.refactorTerm(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, Goal, Object, Rule, JTerm).
    protected void
    TermLabelManager.performChildAndGrandchildPolicies(TermServices services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm, Map<Name,ChildTermLabelPolicy> policies, Set<TermLabel> newLabels)
    Performs the given child and grandchild ChildTermLabelPolicy instances.
    protected void
    TermLabelManager.performDirectChildPolicies(TermServices services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm, Map<Name,ChildTermLabelPolicy> policies, Set<TermLabel> newLabels)
    Performs the given direct ChildTermLabelPolicy instances.
    protected ImmutableArray<TermLabel>
    TermLabelManager.performRefactoring(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm term, Set<TermLabelRefactoring> activeRefactorings)
    Computes the new labels as part of the refactoring for the given JTerm.
    protected void
    TermLabelManager.performTermLabelPolicies(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm, Map<Name,TermLabelPolicy> policies, Set<TermLabel> newLabels)
    Performs the given TermLabelPolicy instances.
    protected void
    TermLabelManager.performTermLabelPolicies(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm, Map<Name,TermLabelPolicy> policies, Set<TermLabel> newLabels, TermLabel label)
    Performs the given TermLabelPolicy instances.
    protected void
    TermLabelManager.performUpdater(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, JTerm modalityTerm, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm, ImmutableList<TermLabelUpdate> updater, Set<TermLabel> newLabels)
    Performs the given child and grandchild TermLabelUpdate instances.
    protected JTerm
    TermLabelManager.refactorApplicationTerm(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer refactorings, TermFactory tf)
    Refactors the labels of the application term.
    void
    TermLabelManager.refactorGoal(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm)
    Refactors all labels in the complete Sequent.
    static void
    TermLabelManager.refactorGoal(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm)
    Refactors all labels in the complete Sequent.
    protected JTerm
    TermLabelManager.refactorLabelsRecursive(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm term, Set<TermLabelRefactoring> activeRefactorings)
    Performs a TermLabel refactoring recursively on the given JTerm.
    protected void
    TermLabelManager.refactorSemisequent(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, Semisequent semisequent, boolean inAntec, Set<TermLabelRefactoring> activeRefactorings)

    void

    Refactors all labels in the complete Sequent.
    static void
    TermLabelManager.refactorSequent(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm)
    Refactors all labels in the complete Sequent.
    JTerm
    TermLabelManager.refactorSequentFormula(TermLabelState state, Services services, JTerm sequentFormula, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Goal goal, Object hint, Rule rule, JTerm tacletTerm)
    Refactors all labels on the PosInOccurrence in the given JTerm of a SequentFormula.
    static JTerm
    TermLabelManager.refactorSequentFormula(TermLabelState state, Services services, JTerm sequentFormula, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm)
    Refactors all labels on the PosInOccurrence in the given JTerm of a SequentFormula.
    JTerm

    Refactors all labels in the given application JTerm.
    static JTerm
    TermLabelManager.refactorTerm(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm)
    Refactors all labels in the complete Sequent.
    protected JTerm
    TermLabelManager.replaceTerm(TermLabelState state, PosInOccurrence pio, JTerm newTerm, TermFactory tf, Set<TermLabelRefactoring> parentRefactorings, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm)

  • Uses of Rule in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

    Subinterfaces of Rule in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    BuiltInRule
    Built-in rule interface.
    interface 
    ExternalSolverRule
    Interface for the rules of external solvers
    interface 
    Rule
    This interface has to be implemented by all classes that want to act as a rule in the calculus.
    Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule that implement Rule
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule
    Rule for the application of AuxiliaryContracts.
    class 
    AbstractBlockContractRule
    Rule for the application of BlockContracts.
    class 
    AbstractLoopContractRule
    Rule for the application of LoopContracts.
    class 
    AbstractLoopInvariantRule
    An abstract super class for loop invariant rules.
    class 
    AntecTaclet
    An AntecTaclet represents a taclet whose find part has to match a top level formula in the antecedent of the sequent.
    final class 
    BlockContractExternalRule
    Rule for the application of BlockContracts.
    class 
    BlockContractInternalRule
    Rule for the application of BlockContracts.
    class 
    FindTaclet
    An abstract class to represent Taclets with a find part.
    final class 
    JmlAssertRule
    A rule for JML assert/assume statements.
    class 
    LoopApplyHeadRule
    This rule transforms a block that starts with a for loop into one that starts with a while loop.
    final class 
    LoopContractExternalRule
    Rule for the application of LoopContracts.
    class 
    LoopContractInternalRule
    Rule for the application of LoopContracts.
    class 
    LoopScopeInvariantRule
    Implementation of the "loop scope invariant" rule as proposed in the PhD thesis by Nathan Wasser.
    class 
    NoFindTaclet
    Used to implement a Taclet that has no find part.
    final class 
    ObserverToUpdateRule
    Implements the rule which translates the toplevel formula {U}[x = rec.query(params);]post to {U}{ x := query(heap, rec, params) }post for model methods.
    final class 
    OneStepSimplifier
     
    class 
    QueryExpand
    The QueryExpand rule allows to apply contracts or to symbolically execute a query expression in the logic.
    class 
    RewriteTaclet
    A RewriteTaclet represents a taclet, whose find can be matched against any term in the sequent no matter where it occurs.
    final class 
    SetStatementRule
    A rule for set statements.
    class 
    SuccTaclet
    A SuccTaclet represents a taclet whose find part has to match a top level formula in the succedent of the sequent.
    class 
    Taclet
    Taclets are the DL-extension of schematic theory specific rules.
    final class 
    UseDependencyContractRule
     
    class 
    UseOperationContractRule
    Implements the rule which inserts operation contracts for a method call.
    class 
    WhileInvariantRule
